Home / Services / Digital Product Creation / Online Course

🎓 Online Course

Launch your own online course without the overwhelm. We handle the entire production process: structuring your curriculum into logical modules and lessons, setting up your course platform (Teachable, Thinkific, Kajabi, or custom), creating video outlines and slide deck templates, building quizzes and assessments, designing a high-converting sales page, and developing a launch strategy with email sequences. You provide the expertise — we turn it into a premium digital product that can generate passive income for years to come.

Service Details

Category: Digital Product Creation

Credits Price: 640 credits (approx. £800)

Turnaround: 14–28 days

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within 14–28 days
Book Online Course Now

Related Digital Product Creation Services

  • PDF / eBook Creation — Professional PDF documents, eBooks, lead magnets, and digital guides with stunning design. (160 credits)
  • SaaS Tool Development — Custom SaaS tool or micro-app development with user authentication, dashboard, and billing. (1600 credits)
  • Plugin Development — Custom WordPress or platform plugin development for specific business needs. (400 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Online Course?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: 14–28 days
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
